productDisplayName: Wills Sport Men Navy Blue and Pink Striped T-shirt
description: Style Note Wills polo t-shirts are made of a soft fabric and is crafted with the label's best yarn. Keep your off-duty composition original with this classic staple. Wear it with corduroy trousers, casual shoes and an understated belt. Product Details Navy blue and pink striped polo t-shirt, has a pink tipped collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs that has tipping, buttoned chest placket, applique on the left chest and a ribbed hem Material and Care100% cotton Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
